events.label: reasoning
events.text: Weep holes missing/blocked at bottom course in masonry veneer. TMS 402 requires flashing and weep holes at bottom of veneer. Missing/blocked weeps = non-compliant. Fail.

events.label: response
events.text: {"decision":"fail","risk":"high","work_stage":"rough-complete","component_conditions":["installed-defective","non-compliant"],"percent_complete":85,"value":0,"sound_source":"","confidence":0.9,"event_time":0,"rate":0,"order":[],"workable":[],"findings":["Weep holes missing or blocked at bottom course of masonry wall","Flashing/weep system non-compliant with TMS 402 and BIA tech notes requiring unobstructed weeps at maximum spacing"],"actions":["Clear/restore weep holes at bottom course to provide unobstructed drainage","Verify flashing is properly installed and continuous at lintels, sills, and base of cavity","Re-inspect weep spacing and flashing continuity before closing out wall","Document corrective work and notify third-party inspector for verification"],"rationale":"TMS 402 and BIA tech notes require properly installed flashing and unobstructed weep holes to drain the masonry cavity. Missing or blocked weeps at the bottom course will trap water, leading to moisture intrusion and wall damage. The work is non-compliant at rough-complete stage and must be corrected before closeout.","references":["TMS 402","BIA Tech Notes"]}
